description:
Private, offline menstrual cycle tracker. No account, no cloud. Mooneva is a private, fully offline period and cycle tracker. All data stays on your device — no account, no cloud sync, no ads. Features
  • Period and cycle tracking with predictions
  • Fertile window and ovulation estimates
  • Daily log: mood, symptoms, flow intensity, discharge
  • PMS window warnings
  • Trends and cycle history
  • Clinical report export
  • Discrete mode (disguises app icon)
  • PIN lock with configurable timeout
  • Reminder notifications
  • Birth control mode (hides fertile window)
  • Fully offline — no internet permission required
Privacy No data ever leaves your device. No analytics, no tracking, no third-party services. Open Source Licensed under GPL-3.0. Source code available on GitHub.
